name: Adaptability
description: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.

name: Aerilate
description: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves.

name: Aftermath
description: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit.

name: Air Lock
description: Eliminates the effects of weather.

name: Analytic
description: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves after the target.

name: Anger Point
description: Maxes the Attack stat after the Pokémon takes a critical hit.

name: Anticipation
description: Senses an opposing Pokémon’s dangerous moves.

name: Arena Trap
description: Prevents opposing Pokémon from fleeing.

name: Aroma Veil
description: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.

name: Aura Break
description: The effects of “Aura” Abilities are reversed.

name: Bad Dreams
description: Reduces the HP of sleeping opposing Pokémon.

name: Battle Armor
description: Protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

name: Big Pecks
description: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.

name: Blaze
description: Powers up Fire-type moves when the Pokémon is in trouble.

name: Bulletproof
description: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.

name: Cheek Pouch
description: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.

name: Chlorophyll
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in sunshine.

name: Clear Body
description: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.

name: Cloud Nine
description: Eliminates the effects of weather.

name: Color Change
description: The Pokémon’s type becomes the type of the move used on it.

name: Competitive
description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

name: Compound Eyes
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s accuracy.

name: Contrary
description: Makes stat changes have an opposite effect.

name: Cursed Body
description: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.

name: Cute Charm
description: Contact with the Pokémon may cause infatuation.

name: Damp
description: Prevents the use of self-destructing moves.

name: Dark Aura
description: Powers up each Pokémon’s Dark-type moves.

name: Defeatist
description: Lowers stats when HP becomes half or less.

name: Defiant
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat when its stats are lowered.

name: Download
description: Adjusts power based on an opposing Pokémon’s stats.

name: Drizzle
description: The Pokémon makes it rain when it enters a battle.

name: Drought
description: Turns the sunlight harsh when the Pokémon enters a battle.

name: Dry Skin
description: Reduces HP if it’s hot. Water restores HP.

name: Early Bird
description: The Pokémon awakens quickly from sleep.

name: Effect Spore
description: Contact may poison or cause paralysis or sleep.

name: Fairy Aura
description: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

name: Filter
description: Reduces damage from supereffective attacks.

name: Flame Body
description: Contact with the Pokémon may burn the attacker.

name: Flare Boost
description: Powers up special attacks when the Pokémon is burned.

name: Flash Fire
description: Powers up the Pokémon’s Fire- type moves if it’s hit by one.

name: Flower Gift
description: Powers up party Pokémon when it is sunny.

name: Flower Veil
description: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.

name: Forecast
description: Castform transforms with the weather.

name: Forewarn
description: Determines what moves an opposing Pokémon has.

name: Friend Guard
description: Reduces damage done to allies.

name: Frisk
description: The Pokémon can check an opposing Pokémon’s held item.

name: Fur Coat
description: Halves damage from physical moves.

name: Gale Wings
description: Gives priority to Flying-type moves.

name: Gluttony
description: Makes the Pokémon use a held Berry earlier than usual.

name: Gooey
description: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.

name: Grass Pelt
description: Boosts the Defense stat in Grassy Terrain.

name: Guts
description: Boosts the Attack stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

name: Harvest
description: May create another Berry after one is used.

name: Healer
description: Sometimes heals an ally’s status condition.

name: Heatproof
description: Weakens the power of Fire-type moves.

name: Heavy Metal
description: Doubles the Pokémon’s weight.

name: Honey Gather
description: The Pokémon may gather Honey from somewhere.

name: Huge Power
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat.

name: Hustle
description: Boosts the Attack stat, but lowers accuracy.

name: Hydration
description: Heals status conditions if it’s raining.

name: Hyper Cutter
description: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering its Attack stat.

name: Ice Body
description: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in a hailstorm.

name: Illuminate
description: Raises the likelihood of meeting wild Pokémon.

name: Illusion
description: Comes out disguised as the Pokémon in the party’s last spot.

name: Immunity
description: Prevents the Pokémon from getting poisoned.

name: Imposter
description: The Pokémon transforms itself into the Pokémon it’s facing.

name: Infiltrator
description: Passes through the opposing Pokémon’s barrier and strikes.

name: Inner Focus
description: Protects the Pokémon from flinching.

name: Insomnia
description: Prevents the Pokémon from falling asleep.

name: Intimidate
description: Lowers the opposing Pokémon’s Attack stat.

name: Iron Barbs
description: Inflicts damage to the attacker on contact.

name: Iron Fist
description: Powers up punching moves.

name: Justified
description: Boosts the Attack stat when it’s hit by a Dark-type move.

name: Keen Eye
description: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering accuracy.

name: Klutz
description: The Pokémon can’t use any held items.

name: Leaf Guard
description: Prevents status conditions in sunny weather.

name: Levitate
description: Gives full immunity to all Ground-type moves.

name: Light Metal
description: Halves the Pokémon’s weight.

name: Lightning Rod
description: Draws in all Electric-type moves to boost its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Limber
description: Protects the Pokémon from paralysis.

name: Liquid Ooze
description: Damages attackers using any draining move.

name: Magic Bounce
description: Reflects status moves.

name: Magic Guard
description: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.

name: Magician
description: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.

name: Magma Armor
description: Prevents the Pokémon from becoming frozen.

name: Magnet Pull
description: Prevents Steel-type Pokémon from escaping.

name: Marvel Scale
description: Boosts the Defense stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

name: Mega Launcher
description: Powers up aura and pulse moves.

name: Minus
description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat if another Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

name: Mold Breaker
description: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.

name: Moody
description: Raises one stat and lowers another.

name: Motor Drive
description: Boosts the Speed stat when it’s hit by an Electric-type move.

name: Moxie
description: Boosts the Attack stat after knocking out any Pokémon.

name: Multiscale
description: Reduces damage the Pokémon takes when its HP is full.

name: Multitype
description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to match the Plate it holds.

name: Mummy
description: Contact with the Pokémon spreads this Ability.

name: Natural Cure
description: All status conditions heal when the Pokémon switches out.

name: No Guard
description: Ensures attacks by or against the Pokémon land.

name: Normalize
description: All the Pokémon’s moves become Normal type.

name: Oblivious
description: Keeps the Pokémon from being infatuated or falling for taunts.

name: Overcoat
description: Protects the Pokémon from things like sand, hail, and powder.

name: Overgrow
description: Powers up Grass-type moves when the Pokémon is in trouble.

name: Own Tempo
description: Prevents the Pokémon from becoming confused.

name: Parental Bond
description: Parent and child attack together.

name: Pickpocket
description: Steals an item from an attacker that made direct contact.

name: Pickup
description: The Pokémon may pick up items.

name: Pixilate
description: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves.

name: Plus
description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat if another Pokémon has Plus or Minus.

name: Poison Heal
description: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.

name: Poison Point
description: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

name: Poison Touch
description: May poison a target when the Pokémon makes contact.

name: Prankster
description: Gives priority to a status move.

name: Pressure
description: The Pokémon raises opposing Pokémon’s PP usage.

name: Protean
description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s using.

name: Pure Power
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Attack stat.

name: Quick Feet
description: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon has a status condition.

name: Rain Dish
description: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in rain.

name: Rattled
description: Some move types scare it and boost its Speed stat.

name: Reckless
description: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

name: Refrigerate
description: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves.

name: Regenerator
description: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.

name: Rivalry
description: Deals more damage to Pokémon of the same gender.

name: Rock Head
description: Protects the Pokémon from recoil damage.

name: Rough Skin
description: Inflicts damage to the attacker on contact.

name: Run Away
description: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

name: Sand Force
description: Boosts certain moves’ power in a sandstorm.

name: Sand Rush
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a sandstorm.

name: Sand Stream
description: The Pokémon summons a sandstorm in battle.

name: Sand Veil
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s evasion in a sandstorm.

name: Sap Sipper
description: Boosts the Attack stat when hit by a Grass-type move.

name: Scrappy
description: Makes Normal- and Fighting-type moves hit Ghost-type Pokémon.

name: Serene Grace
description: Boosts the likelihood of additional effects occurring.

name: Shadow Tag
description: Prevents opposing Pokémon from escaping.

name: Shed Skin
description: The Pokémon may heal its own status conditions.

name: Sheer Force
description: Removes additional effects to increase move damage.

name: Shell Armor
description: Protects the Pokémon from critical hits.

name: Shield Dust
description: Blocks the additional effects of attacks taken.

name: Simple
description: The Pokémon is prone to wild stat changes.

name: Skill Link
description: Increases the number of times multi-strike moves hit.

name: Slow Start
description: Temporarily halves the Pokémon’s Attack and Speed stats.

name: Sniper
description: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.

name: Snow Cloak
description: Boosts evasion in a hailstorm.

name: Snow Warning
description: The Pokémon summons a hailstorm when it enters a battle.

name: Solar Power
description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat in sunny weather, but HP decreases.

name: Solid Rock
description: Reduces damage from supereffective attacks.

name: Soundproof
description: Gives full immunity to all sound-based moves.

name: Speed Boost
description: Its Speed stat is gradually boosted.

name: Stall
description: The Pokémon moves after all other Pokémon do.

name: Stance Change
description: The Pokémon changes form depending on how it battles.

name: Static
description: Contact with the Pokémon may cause paralysis.

name: Steadfast
description: Boosts the Speed stat each time the Pokémon flinches.

name: Stench
description: The stench may cause the target to flinch.

name: Sticky Hold
description: Protects the Pokémon from item theft.

name: Storm Drain
description: Draws in all Water-type moves to boost its Sp. Atk stat.

name: Strong Jaw
description: The Pokémon’s strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.

name: Sturdy
description: It cannot be knocked out with one hit.

name: Suction Cups
description: Negates all moves and items that force switching out.

name: Super Luck
description: Boosts the critical-hit ratios of moves.

name: Swarm
description: Powers up Bug-type moves when the Pokémon is in trouble.

name: Sweet Veil
description: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.

name: Swift Swim
description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in rain.

name: Symbiosis
description: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.

name: Synchronize
description: Passes poison, paralyze, or burn to the Pokémon that inflicted it.

name: Tangled Feet
description: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.

name: Technician
description: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.

name: Telepathy
description: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

name: Teravolt
description: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.

name: Thick Fat
description: Boosts resistance to Fire-​ and Ice-type moves.

name: Tinted Lens
description: Powers up “not very effective” moves.

name: Torrent
description: Powers up Water-type moves when the Pokémon is in trouble.

name: Tough Claws
description: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

name: Toxic Boost
description: Powers up physical attacks when the Pokémon is poisoned.

name: Trace
description: The Pokémon copies an opposing Pokémon’s Ability.

name: Truant
description: The Pokémon can’t attack on consecutive turns.

name: Turboblaze
description: Moves can be used on the target regardless of its Abilities.

name: Unaware
description: Ignores the opposing Pokémon’s stat changes.

name: Unburden
description: Boosts the Speed stat if its held item is used or lost.

name: Unnerve
description: Unnerves opposing Pokémon and makes them unable to eat Berries.

name: Victory Star
description: Boosts the accuracy of its allies and itself.

name: Vital Spirit
description: Prevents the Pokémon from falling asleep.

name: Volt Absorb
description: Restores HP if hit by an Electric-type move.

name: Water Absorb
description: Restores HP if hit by a Water-type move.

name: Water Veil
description: Prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.

name: Weak Armor
description: Physical attacks lower its Defense stat and raise its Speed stat.

name: White Smoke
description: Prevents other Pokémon from lowering its stats.

name: Wonder Guard
description: Only supereffective moves will hit.

name: Wonder Skin
description: Makes status moves more likely to miss.

name: Zen Mode
description: Changes the Pokémon’s shape when HP is half or less.
